summary: A great Deadhead night highlighted by a legendary Help > Slip > Franklin’s and superb Peggy‑O, though the recording source and quality are not specified.
review: Reviewers rave about the energy of the show, calling it a truly great night with the band “bringing it.” The performance of Peggy‑O is praised as the best of the evening and the Help > Slip > Franklin’s sequence is described as legendary. No details are given about the recording source or sound quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic review focuses on strong musical performance and standout songs; lack of any recording‑quality comments keeps the overall rating modest.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix or source were provided in the review.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: The reviewer conveys an overall high‑energy, cohesive concert that felt like a perfect night for Deadheads.
